title: White Lanterns
description: Changes the color of the lanterns to white, emulating the tone of an LED light
body:
This resource pack changes the color of the lantern block to white, similar to that of an LED light, to give your worlds a modern touch.

![How it looks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/RhpLbnH3/images/a247e50e1957e2f6d09a69cc2701b785e3ca0440.png)
##
### Also try [Luish's Katanas](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/luishs-katanas)!
